articles.title: Refund Processing Policy
articles.content: Refunds are processed to the original payment method within 5-7 business days after approval. Full refunds are issued for: defective items within warranty, wrong items delivered, and items damaged during shipping. Partial refunds may be offered at agent discretion for minor cosmetic issues. Refunds over $200 require escalation to a supervisor for approval. A refund cannot be issued if one has already been processed for the same order.

articles.title: Standard Return Policy
articles.content: ShopWave offers returns within the designated return window for each product category. Standard products have a 30-day return window from delivery date. Electronics accessories have a 60-day return window. High-value electronics (items over $200) have a shortened 15-day return window. Items must be in original condition and packaging unless the item is defective or was damaged during shipping. The return window is calculated from the delivery_date, not the order_date.

articles.title: Damaged Items Policy
articles.content: Items that arrive damaged (damaged during shipping) qualify for an immediate full refund without requiring the item to be returned. The customer should be asked to provide photographic evidence if possible, but refunds for damaged items should not be delayed pending photos. If the item was damaged by the customer after delivery, standard return policy applies instead. For items over $200 that arrive damaged, escalate to supervisor.

articles.title: Standard Return Policy
articles.content: ShopWave offers returns within the designated return window for each product category. Standard products have a 30-day return window from delivery date. Electronics accessories have a 60-day return window. High-value electronics (items over $200) have a shortened 15-day return window. Items must be in original condition and packaging unless the item is defective or was damaged during shipping. The return window is calculated from the delivery_date, not the order_date.

articles.title: Product-Specific Return Rules
articles.content: Specific product categories have additional return restrictions: (1) Electronics with broken seals cannot be returned unless defective. (2) Footwear must be unworn and in original packaging — no returns if used outdoors. (3) Hygiene products (yoga mats, personal care) are non-returnable if used. (4) Electronics that have been registered online by the customer are non-returnable. (5) High-value electronics (over $200) have a 15-day return window instead of the standard 30 days.

articles.title: Damaged Items Policy
articles.content: Items that arrive damaged (damaged during shipping) qualify for an immediate full refund without requiring the item to be returned. The customer should be asked to provide photographic evidence if possible, but refunds for damaged items should not be delayed pending photos. If the item was damaged by the customer after delivery, standard return policy applies instead. For items over $200 that arrive damaged, escalate to supervisor.
